case_title: THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA VS. CHARLES JEROME ROTHBAUM (SBN 54450)

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROTHBAUM (SBN 54450), CHARLES JEROME $46,757.21 PRINCIPAL, $18,056.80 INTEREST, $370.00 COSTS, $147.00 CLIENT SECURITY FUND PROCESSING FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $65,331.01, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
